# Changelog

Veld follows semantic versioning. See [PROGRESS.md](https://github.com/Portll/veld/blob/main/PROGRESS.md)
for the in-flight track, and the [releases page](https://github.com/Portll/veld/releases)
on GitHub for tagged versions.

## Current track

- **`v0.7.6-unstable`** — being stabilized toward `v0.8`
- **`v0.8` (next cut)** — clean release from `main`
- **`v0.9`** — Redb integration + public-release hardening
  (see [decision 0001](decisions/0001-redb-migration.md))

## Recent benchmarked snapshot (v0.7.2)

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| MRR | 0.925 |
| Temporal | 0.900 |
| Single-hop | 1.000 |
| Composite | 78.4% |

Full benchmark history: [BENCHMARKS.md](https://github.com/Portll/veld/blob/main/BENCHMARKS.md).
